; 墨阅 · 侧边栏 "传书" 入口(排在 Claude 下面);0- 前缀确保先加载→排最后
; 克隆自 claude.qmd,仅换明文标识(openUpload/传书/upload),哈希锚点不变
; 点击 = 打开 upload(传书)AppLoad 应用窗口,显示上传二维码

AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[3819512207256720568]]#[[4073320026945606142]]
        INSERT {
            ~&16385778650434842232&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: openUpload
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "openUpload"
                ~&214642559243&~: "传书"
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/appload/icons/appload"
                ~&7082453764421&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                property var uploadWindow: null
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    launchUploadDirect();
                    ~&233744436321411&~.~&6500896584423236548&~();
                }
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&15061686673205541622&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                ~&11921478716705041271&~: ~&233744436321411&~

                function launchUploadDirect() {
                    ~&7083211098251&~();
                    var view = ~&254540341572282132&~.appLoadView;
                    view.~&233748328658231&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                    if (uploadWindow) {
                        uploadWindow.maximize();
                        return;
                    }
                    var item = view.item;
                    if (!item) {
                        Qt.callLater(function() { openUpload.spawnUploadWindow(); });
                        return;
                    }
                    spawnUploadWindow();
                }

                function spawnUploadWindow() {
                    var view = ~&254540341572282132&~.appLoadView;
                    var item = view.item;
                    if (!item || uploadWindow) {
                        return;
                    }
                    if (item.windowArchetype.status !== Component.Ready) {
                        console.log("[upload.qmd] window archetype not ready");
                        return;
                    }
                    var win = item.windowArchetype.createObject(item.absoluteRoot, { x: 100, y: 100 });
                    if (win === null) {
                        console.log("[upload.qmd] failed to create window");
                        return;
                    }
                    win.appName = "传书";
                    win.supportsScaling = true;
                    win.disablesWindowedMode = false;
                    win.globalWidth = Qt.binding(function() { return item.width; });
                    win.globalHeight = Qt.binding(function() { return item.height; });
                    win.minWidth = 405;
                    win.minHeight = 540;
                    win.implicitWidth = 405;
                    win.implicitHeight = 540;
                    win.scaledContentWidth = 1620;
                    win.scaledContentHeight = 2160;
                    win.qtfbKey = -1;
                    win.closed.connect(function() {
                        openUpload.uploadWindow = null;
                        win.destroy();
                    });
                    win.loadApplication("upload");
                    uploadWindow = win;
                    win.maximize();
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[233744436321411]]
        REBUILD [[15578034235503008618]]
            LOCATE AFTER STREAM \~&16045040163728568448&~\ INSERT STREAM \, openUpload\
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
